title: trifolium longipes var. shastense
intro: Trifolium longipes var. shastense, also known as Shasta clover, is a perennial legume native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of isoflavones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Shasta clover include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood sugar control, and provide relief from menopausal symptoms. Shasta clover can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in herbal remedies to support cardiovascular and reproductive health.
